lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Uy! Ikaw pala 'yung bago dito! Welcome sa tindahan ko!
lines.english: Hey! So you're the new one here! Welcome to my store!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Ako si Ate Merly, ang tindera ng sari-sari store na 'to. Kung kailangan mo — nandito 'yan!
lines.english: I'm Ate Merly, the shopkeeper of this sari-sari store. If you need it — it's here!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Pandesal, kape, skyflakes, C2 — lahat meron. Basta sabihin mo lang, ha?
lines.english: Bread rolls, coffee, crackers, iced tea — I have everything. Just tell me, okay?

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: At siyempre, pag bumili ka nang madalas, magiging suki ka! May diskwento para sa suki. Hehe.
lines.english: And of course, if you buy often, you'll become a regular! There's a discount for regulars. Hehe.

choices.tagalog: Salamat, Ate Merly! Magkano po ang pandesal?
choices.english: Thanks, Ate Merly! How much is the bread?

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Ah, gusto mo bang mamili? Sige, turo ko sa iyo!
lines.english: Oh, you want to shop? Sure, I'll teach you!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Una, tanungin mo: 'Magkano po?' — 'yan ang pinaka-importanteng salita sa palengke at tindahan!
lines.english: First, ask: 'How much?' — that's the most important word at the market and shop!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Tapos, kung gusto mo bumili, sabihin mo ang bayad mo. 'Eto po ang bayad ko.'
lines.english: Then, if you want to buy, say your payment. 'Here is my payment.'

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Kapag may sukli, ibibigay ko sa iyo. Huwag mong kalimutan ang sukli! Importante 'yan!
lines.english: If there's change, I'll give it to you. Don't forget your change! That's important!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: At kung wala kang barya — ay nako, hirap 'yan. Magdala ka lagi ng barya, ha?
lines.english: And if you don't have coins — oh boy, that's tough. Always bring coins, okay?

choices.tagalog: Sige po, bibili na po ako!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Psst, halika muna dito. May chika ako sa iyo.
lines.english: Psst, come here first. I have gossip for you.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Alam mo ba na si Kuya Jojo sa palengke, dati siyang nag-audition para sa singing contest? Grabe ang boses! Pero mas pinili niya ang isda. Haha!
lines.english: Did you know Kuya Jojo at the market used to audition for singing contests? Amazing voice! But he chose fish instead. Haha!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Tapos si Padre Miguel, 'yung nasa plasa? Dati siyang teacher bago naging pari. Matalino talaga 'yun.
lines.english: Then Padre Miguel, the one at the plaza? He used to be a teacher before becoming a priest. He's really smart.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: At si Manong Boy naman, ang sabi niya dati siyang racer ng traysikel. Pero wag mo nang tanungin — mahaba ang kwento!
lines.english: And Manong Boy, he says he used to be a tricycle racer. But don't ask him about it — it's a long story!

choices.tagalog: Ate Merly, chismosa talaga kayo! Hehe.
choices.english: Ate Merly, you're really a gossip! Hehe.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Magandang umaga! Bagong bukas pa lang ang tindahan. Ang sariwa ng pandesal ngayon!
lines.english: Good morning! The store just opened. The bread is so fresh today!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Kapag umaga, 'yan ang best time bumili ng pandesal. Mainit-init pa, galing sa panadero.
lines.english: In the morning, that's the best time to buy bread. Still hot, fresh from the baker.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Kape at pandesal — 'yan ang combo ng mga Pilipino. Classic!
lines.english: Coffee and bread — that's the Filipino combo. Classic!

choices.tagalog: Bibli po ako ng pandesal at kape!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Magandang hapon! Medyo tahimik ngayon, mainit kasi sa labas.
lines.english: Good afternoon! It's a bit quiet now, it's hot outside.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Pag hapon, C2 ang best-seller ko. Malamig at masarap — pampawala ng init!
lines.english: In the afternoon, C2 is my best-seller. Cold and tasty — beats the heat!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: O kaya saging o kamote, kung gusto mo ng meryenda na Pinoy talaga.
lines.english: Or banana or sweet potato, if you want a truly Pinoy snack.

choices.tagalog: Isa pong C2! Uhaw na uhaw na ako.
choices.english: One C2 please! I'm so thirsty.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Uy, gabi na! Magsasara na ako ng tindahan, pero sige, bilisan mo lang!
lines.english: Hey, it's already night! I'm closing up shop, but sure, make it quick!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Pag gabi, yelo na lang at skyflakes ang madalas bilhin. Pang-handa sa gabi.
lines.english: At night, just ice and crackers are often bought. Preparation for the evening.

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Bukas ulit, ha? Mas maganda ang presyo ko pag umaga. Hehe. Ingat ka pauwi!
lines.english: Come back tomorrow, okay? My prices are better in the morning. Hehe. Be safe going home!

choices.tagalog: Sige po, ingat din po kayo!

choices.english: One ice please, I'll be quick!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Ay, galing kay Kapitan 'to? Bangus! Naku, salamat naman!
lines.english: Oh, this is from the Captain? Milkfish! Oh my, thank you!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Perfect timing — wala na akong ulam para mamaya. Ipriprito ko na lang 'to!
lines.english: Perfect timing — I don't have a dish for later. I'll just fry this!

lines.speaker: ate_merly
lines.tagalog: Nako, mabait ka pala. Alam mo, bibigyan kita ng diskwento next time bumili ka. Suki na kita!
lines.english: Oh, you're so kind. You know what, I'll give you a discount next time you buy. You're a regular now!

choices.tagalog: Salamat po, Ate Merly! Suki na talaga!
choices.english: Thank you, Ate Merly! I'm really a regular now!
